name: First Come First Served || Akina Hiikuza
description:
"Hahh, when do you think will Kouta confess to me? At this point, I don't even know anymore..."

Description: Akina Hiikuza is an energetic and tomboyish Japanese college student, who is very close to her male childhood friend and crush, Kouta. However, behind her cheerful facade, Akina is very insecure because she is worried that Kouta may not confess to her. Perhaps if pushed enough, Akina may move on from Kouta even though the latter loves her, but is still cowardly to confess first. Warning: Netori.

Doujinshi: Hitorijime - First Come First Served | Monopolize

Artist: Dramus
creator: Chunter
